symbols.name: FileStorageProviderCompressionExtensions
symbols.summary: Extension methods for BridgingIT.DevKit.Application.Storage.IFileStorageProvider to add compression and decompression functionality using SharpCompress.

symbols.name: WriteCompressedFileAsync(IFileStorageProvider, string, Stream, IProgress, FileCompressionOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Writes a file to the storage provider with compression using SharpCompress.
symbols.remarks: This method uses SharpCompress to create compressed files compatible with popular tools (e.g., 7-Zip, WinZip). Supported formats: Zip, Tar, GZip. Password protection is not supported during compression with SharpCompress.

syntax.content: public static Task WriteCompressedFileAsync(this IFileStorageProvider provider, string path, Stream content, IProgress progress = null, FileCompressionOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for writing the compressed file.
The path where the compressed file will be written (e.g., "output.zip").
The stream containing the content to compress.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the compression process.
Optional configuration settings for compression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result indicating success or failure of the compression operation.

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for writing the compressed file.
The path where the compressed file will be written (e.g., "output.zip").
The stream containing the content to compress.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the compression process.
Optional configuration settings for compression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result indicating success or failure of the compression operation.

symbols.name: ReadCompressedFile(IFileStorageProvider, string, string, IProgress, FileCompressionOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Reads a compressed file from the storage provider and decompresses it into a stream, optionally handling password-protected compression using SharpCompress.
symbols.remarks: This method uses SharpCompress to read compressed files with password protection compatible with popular tools (e.g., 7-Zip, WinZip). Supported formats: Zip, Tar, GZip. It supports Deflate64 decompression and traditional PKZIP or AES encryption, depending on the original file's configuration. Uses BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.DecryptionError if password is wrong or decryption fails.

syntax.content: public static Task> ReadCompressedFile(this IFileStorageProvider provider, string path, string password = null, IProgress progress = null, FileCompressionOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the compressed file.
The path of the compressed file to read (e.g., "input.zip").
An optional password for decrypting the compressed file. If null or empty, no decryption is applied.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the decompression process.
Optional configuration settings for decompression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601 containing the decompressed stream on success, or an error on failure.

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the compressed file.
The path of the compressed file to read (e.g., "input.zip").
An optional password for decrypting the compressed file. If null or empty, no decryption is applied.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the decompression process.
Optional configuration settings for decompression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601 containing the decompressed stream on success, or an error on failure.

symbols.name: CompressAsync(IFileStorageProvider, string, string, IProgress, FileCompressionOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Writes a compressed file to the storage provider by compressing a file or all files and subdirectories in a directory using SharpCompress.
symbols.remarks: This method uses SharpCompress to create a compressed file from a file or directory path in the storage provider, maintaining compatibility with popular tools (e.g., 7-Zip, WinZip). Supported formats: Zip, Tar, GZip. Password protection is not supported during compression with SharpCompress.

syntax.content: public static Task CompressAsync(this IFileStorageProvider provider, string path, string inputPath, IProgress progress = null, FileCompressionOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the input and writing the compressed file.
The path where the compressed file will be written (e.g., "output.zip").
The path of the file or directory to compress (e.g., "file.txt" or "directory").
An optional progress reporter for tracking the compression process.
Optional configuration settings for compression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result indicating success or failure of the compression operation.

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the input and writing the compressed file.
The path where the compressed file will be written (e.g., "output.zip").
The path of the file or directory to compress (e.g., "file.txt" or "directory").
An optional progress reporter for tracking the compression process.
Optional configuration settings for compression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result indicating success or failure of the compression operation.

symbols.name: UncompressAsync(IFileStorageProvider, string, string, string, string, IProgress, FileCompressionOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.fullName: BridgingIT.DevKit.Application.Storage.FileStorageProviderCompressionExtensions.UncompressAsync(BridgingIT.DevKit.Application.Storage.IFileStorageProvider, string, string, string, string, System.IProgress, BridgingIT.DevKit.Application.Storage.FileCompressionOptions, System.Threading.CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Reads a compressed file from the storage provider and uncompresses it to a directory in the storage provider, optionally handling password-protected compression using SharpCompress.
symbols.remarks: This method uses SharpCompress to read and extract compressed files with password protection compatible with popular tools (e.g., 7-Zip, WinZip). Supported formats: Zip, Tar, GZip. It supports Deflate64 decompression and traditional PKZIP or AES encryption, depending on the original file's configuration. Uses BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.DecryptionError if password is wrong or decryption fails.

syntax.content: public static Task UncompressAsync(this IFileStorageProvider provider, string path, string outputPath, string searchPattern = null, string password = null, IProgress progress = null, FileCompressionOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the compressed file and writing the uncompressed files.
The path of the compressed file to uncompress (e.g., "input.zip").
The directory path where the uncompressed files will be written (e.g., "uncompressed").
An optional password for decrypting the compressed file. If null or empty, no decryption is applied.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the uncompression process.
Optional configuration settings for uncompression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result indicating success or failure of the uncompression operation.

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the compressed file and writing the uncompressed files.
The path of the compressed file to uncompress (e.g., "input.zip").
The directory path where the uncompressed files will be written (e.g., "uncompressed").
An optional password for decrypting the compressed file. If null or empty, no decryption is applied.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the uncompression process.
Optional configuration settings for uncompression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result indicating success or failure of the uncompression operation.

symbols.name: UncompressToStreamAsync(IFileStorageProvider, string, string, string, IProgress, FileCompressionOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Reads a compressed file from the storage provider and uncompresses it to a readonly dictionary of System.String (file path) and System.IO.MemoryStream.
symbols.remarks: This method does NOT write to storage, it only returns the contents in-memory as a readonly dictionary. The caller is responsible for disposing the returned MemoryStreams. Uses BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.DecryptionError if password is wrong or decryption fails.

syntax.content: public static Task>> UncompressToStreamAsync(this IFileStorageProvider provider, string path, string searchPattern = null, string password = null, IProgress progress = null, FileCompressionOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the compressed file.
The path of the compressed file to uncompress (e.g., "input.zip").
An optional password for decrypting the compressed file. If null or empty, no decryption is applied.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the uncompression process.
Optional configuration settings for uncompression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A Result<IReadOnlyDictionary<string, MemoryStream>> containing the dictionary on success, or an error on failure. The dictionary maps archive entry paths (including names) to their decompressed System.IO.MemoryStreams.

parameters.description: The file storage provider to use for reading the compressed file.
The path of the compressed file to uncompress (e.g., "input.zip").
An optional password for decrypting the compressed file. If null or empty, no decryption is applied.
An optional progress reporter for tracking the uncompression process.
Optional configuration settings for uncompression. If null, default settings are used.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A Result<IReadOnlyDictionary<string, MemoryStream>> containing the dictionary on success, or an error on failure. The dictionary maps archive entry paths (including names) to their decompressed System.IO.MemoryStreams.
